meta.title: mobiqo — Mobile intelligence, simple products
meta.description: mobiqo is a software studio crafting smart, simple and beautiful mobile and web products.

hero.subtitle: mobiqo designs and builds smart mobile and web apps that people actually enjoy using every day.

about.title: A small team with a clear vision.
about.body_1: mobiqo is a mobile-first software studio. We turn complex needs into simple, fast and beautiful digital products.
about.body_2: We design, build and maintain our products end-to-end — bringing design, engineering and product strategy under one roof.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: Less but right. Every screen and interaction serves a purpose.

values.title: Performance
values.desc: Fast, fluid and reliable. Users hate waiting — so do we.

values.title: Craft
values.desc: Beautiful gets used. Design matters as much as the product itself.

values.title: Longevity
values.desc: Our products live as long as they're used, not just until ship day.

contact.title: Got an idea? Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Reach out for partnerships, feedback, or simply to say hello.
